2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.3.25 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "poolcontrol" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (lib/helpers/aiForecastHelper.js, lib/helpers/aiHelper.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/helpers/controlHelper2.js, lib/helpers/debugLogHelper.js, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".
